core-3 governing docs within their line budget

a real SECURITY.md coordinated-disclosure policy ships

preflight surfaces the adopter GitHub environment (user-private->provenance-skip, @your-org CODEOWNERS, workflow validity) advisorily without changing its exit code

the adopter-clean obtain mechanism is wired + link-safe (.gitattributes export-ignore set present, no pruned path is a markdown-link target, adopter-export.sh prunes maintainer-only + unused profiles)
the S1 process-weight mode is enforcement-blind — no conformance check / CI gate reads it, so a mode can never weaken an applicable control
the learner-facing why-layer is wired + drift-locked (sparkwright explain routes; no orphan rationale; every S1-checklist enforcer is taught)
the feature-flag kill-switch reference is wired end-to-end (flags registry + flagged endpoint + flag-aware smoke + golden-path two-boot flip)

the agent sandbox is PROVEN to contain — boot + probe FS-scope/egress/caps, each negative paired with a positive control (.github/workflows/golden-path.yml containment-audit job)
the reference app ships security headers + golden-path asserts them on the booted app (server.ts + .github/workflows/golden-path.yml)
workflows scope OIDC id-token per-job + ship no AWS/Azure/GCP static keys (curated list) (profiles/*/ci.yml + .github/workflows)

ci.yml enforces the conformance aggregate on every PR (runs verify.sh --require, not only --selftest)

the cadenced meta-control panel can't go stale unnoticed — a freshness gate (weekly drift-watch + advisory doctor) flags >N tags since the last addressed run; mechanism + marker↔log sync are locked (conformance/meta-control-fresh.sh, docs/operations/meta-control.md)
the runaway circuit-breaker is installed and enforces token/step/agent ceilings on reported usage (agent-immutable config; best-effort post-step tally; enforced when the orchestration loop calls it)
VERSION agrees with the git tag state (no skipped release bump)
the operate-loop sensor emits an OTel-shaped trace + a real scorecard derives from it (golden-path agentops-sensor job; scripts/otel-trace.sh + otel-to-scorecard.sh)

the 4-seat orchestration loop runs end-to-end (fan-out -> contain -> integrate -> trace) -- reference loop proven by golden-path on a fixture engineer; LLM agent work exercised live, substituted in CI

parallel-engineer writes to overlapping files are detected and refused before integration -- no silent corruption (proven by golden-path on conflicting fixtures) -- changed-file granularity; the no-corruption floor is git's, the mechanic makes it proactive + observable + locked

the kit ships its own design + plan + tdd + review + worktrees skills (skills/design/SKILL.md, skills/plan/SKILL.md, skills/tdd/SKILL.md, skills/review/SKILL.md, skills/worktrees/SKILL.md) encoding the kit's design + planning + testing + review + isolation disciplines, referenced by the orchestrator (Architect hat + Isolation), engineer (TDD), and reviewer (code review) -- bricks #1-5 of the kit's own skill spine replacing superpowers

a guard breach in the orchestration loop raises a plain-language, role-addressed escalation record and pauses; the loop resumes only on a human-ratified verdict, fail-closed on none/invalid -- reference seam proven by golden-path on a fixture engineer; the plain-language affordance is gated, subjective readability is not; ratifier identity is unverified at the FLOOR (server-side WHO-may-ratify is the adopter's forge controls)

release tagging: the coherence-guarded FLOOR scripts/release-tag.sh tags v<VERSION> idempotently + coherently on any forge (proven by --selftest); the kit runs it manually after merge, auto-tag-on-merge ships as OPT-IN GitHub/GitLab references
